message:
feat(cli): Enhance doctor and packs commands with rich_rust output

Phase 4 (P4.1, P4.2): Migrate CLI commands to use DcgConsole and markup

doctor command:
- Add doctor_rich() with DcgConsole markup for status icons
- Use colored status icons (✓ green, ⚠ yellow, ✗ red, ○ dim)
- Display remediation hints with dim styling
- Feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = "rich-output")]

packs command:
- Add list_packs_rich() with DcgConsole markup
- Group packs by category with rule dividers
- Status indicators: ● (enabled/green) and ○ (disabled/dim)
- Verbose mode shows pattern counts
- Feature-gated with proper cfg attributes

Both commands fall back to original output when rich-output
feature is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
